Under a non-default configuration used in some clustered deployments, this inconsistency can result in reflected XSS in the OpenAM origin without authentication.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fhrq-3gmx-p879", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-22T20:39:06Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhrq-3gmx-p879", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fhrq-3gmx-p879"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44793"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-22T20:39:06Z", "references": ["https://github.com/OpenIdentityPlatform/OpenAM/security/advisories/GHSA-fhrq-3gmx-p879", "https://github.com/OpenIdentityPlatform/OpenAM/releases/tag/16.1.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhrq-3gmx-p879"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/OpenIdentityPlatform/OpenAM/security-advisories/GHSA-fhrq-3gmx-p879", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/OpenIdentityPlatform/OpenAM", "summary": "OpenAM SAML2 Cluster Cookie-Hash-Redirect Path has Pre-authentication Reflected XSS via `FSUtils.postToTarget`", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-22T20:39:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhrq-3gmx-p879", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "16.1.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.openidentityplatform.openam:openam-federation-library"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 16.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
